2606.19741.title: Interpreting Neural Combinatorial Optimization via Evolving Programmatic Bottlenecks
2606.19741.paper_summary: Neural Combinatorial Optimization (NCO) achieves strong performance, yet its black-box nature remains a key roadblock to deployment and scientific diagnosis. Standard interpretability tools, such as Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs), are ill-equipped for NCO, whose decisions are dynamic, state-dependent, and lack proper concept vocabulary definition. To close this gap, we introduce Evolving Programmatic Bottlenecks (EPB), to our knowledge, the first framework for interpreting NCO policies by distilling black-box NCO models into human-readable program portfolios. EPB employs an LLM to autonomously evolve a bank of programs, where each program's per-step action distribution serves as the bottleneck. EPB works through an iterative framework: Block I fixes program bank capacity and introduces a hybrid textual-numerical gradient descent scheme that couples numerical gradients for student router updates and textual gradients for LLM-based program revision; Block II dynamically adapts bank capacity via fault-targeted expansion and redundancy pruning. Extensive experiments demonstrate EPB's effectiveness and broad applicability, where the distilled program portfolios largely match original performance. EPB also reveals that NCO behavior shifts across optimization stages and can be approximated as a composition of classic heuristic variants. Our work advances interpretable NCO and establishes EPB as a promising tool for interpreting sequential decision-making models.
2606.19741.paper_summary_zh: 神經組合優化（NCO）表現優異，但其黑箱特性仍然是部署和科學診斷的主要障礙。標準的可解釋性工具，如概念瓶頸模型（CBMs），對於NCO來說並不適用，因為其決策是動態的、依賴於狀態的，且缺乏適當的概念詞彙定義。為了填補這一空白，我們提出了演變程序瓶頸（EPB），據我們所知，這是第一個通過將黑箱NCO模型提煉為人類可讀的程序組合來解釋NCO政策的框架。EPB利用大型語言模型（LLM）自主演變一個程序庫，其中每個程序的每步行動分佈作為瓶頸。EPB通過一個迭代框架運作：第一部分固定程序庫容量，並引入一種混合文本-數值梯度下降方案，該方案將數值梯度用於學生路由器更新，文本梯度用於基於LLM的程序修訂；第二部分通過故障針對擴展和冗餘修剪動態調整庫容量。大量實驗證明了EPB的有效性和廣泛適用性，提煉的程序組合在很大程度上與原始性能相匹配。EPB還揭示了NCO行為在優化階段之間的變化，並可以近似為經典啟發式變體的組合。我們的工作推進了可解釋的NCO，並確立了EPB作為解釋序列決策模型的有前景工具。
2606.19741.author: Haocheng Duan et.al.
2606.19741.authors: Haocheng Duan, Yuxin Guo, Jieyi Bi, Anqi Xie, Sirui Li, Yining Ma, Cathy Wu
